title: Lootbags
description: Add an element of surprise to your everyday mob grinding!
body:
This mod adds Lootbags for Minecraft Forge version 1.19.2 | 1.19.4

Check out all my mods: [linktr.ee/chickenmods](https://linktr.ee/chickenmods)

### **Features**

>Different Tiers of Lootbags

>Craftable Lootbags

>Mob Dropped Lootbags

>Recipe Book Support

Want me to add something that is not currently available? Post a comment letting me know and ill see what I can do!
